purpose: A menu button variant styled with the SAP AI accent, opening a menu of Joule-powered actions. Used in toolbars where multiple AI actions are grouped behind one entry point.
whenToUse: Toolbar entry point for 2–8 AI-powered actions
Card or panel header with an AI shortcut menu
Object page actions where AI is one of several action groups
When AI actions need dedicated visual emphasis
whenNotToUse: For a single AI action — use AIButton
For AI action with variants sharing a primary — use AISplitMenuButton
For >8 items — use a dedicated Joule panel
doRules: Include a Joule spark icon on the button
Order menu items by frequency of use
Keep menu concise — 3–6 items is ideal
dontRules: Do not mix AI and non-AI actions in the same menu — split them
Do not omit the AI visual accent — users need to know AI is invoked
Do not use for destructive actions
Do not chain AI actions without user confirmation between steps

layoutGuidance.alignment: Same as other buttons in the row

requirements: Keyboard: Enter opens; Arrow keys navigate; Escape closes
